_publications._publicationTitle: MEK Inhibitors Lead to PDGFR Pathway Upregulation and Sensitize Tumors to RAF Dimer Inhibitors in NF1-Deficient Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor.

_contextSnippet: Bliss synergy analysis demonstrated that this combination had a strong synergetic inhibitory effect of MPNST growth
details: Used for Bliss synergy analysis to demonstrate strong synergistic inhibitory effects of drug combinations
